title: data-us pack=kpi-quarterly output
description: Pack output for `data-markets/scripts/pack.py --ticker {T} --pack kpi-quarterly`. US-only (SEC EDGAR dimensional XBRL; the facade refuses any other market with a usage_error). Two extract_dimensional_revenue arms over one shared fiscal-year window: 10-Q quarterly dimensional-revenue facts + 10-K FY totals (the derived-Q4 basis, FY − ΣQ1-3), merged into one facts[] list with per-accession dei fiscal calendars. Single ticker only by design (SEC EDGAR is rate-limited 10 req/s).

company.description: Ticker echo from the extractor (Tier A — official primary source).

facts.description: Merged 10-Q + 10-K dimensional-revenue facts, each carrying the parallel fiscal + calendar labels and per-fact filing provenance (accession + filed). Shape: sec_edgar_client.extract_dimensional_revenue.

duration_months.description: Reported window length: 3 (single quarter), 6/9 (YTD cumulative), 12 (FY total).

fiscal_year.description: Derived per fact against the filing's own dei calendar — never period_end[:4].

fiscal_calendars.description: Per-accession dei cover-tag calendar, read from each filing's own facts (52/53-week FYE drift is captured per filing, never cached per ticker).

coverage.description: Per-arm coverage reports, verbatim from the extractor; `_status` is the pack's self-declared section status (ok when both arms succeeded, partial when the 10-K arm failed — its error slot then sits in `annual`).
